understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding spike tiles that end the run. Each level provides 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player moves on a grid using directional actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.). Gravity affects movement. CLICK action removes clickable tiles at specified positions. Attempts restart on failure (spikes, running out of turns, or other failures). No undo mechanic observed.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1 turn 3: MOVE_LEFT | Goal is at [3,7] far above; breakable blocks block upward path. Move left then right to test horizontal freedom, but main path requires clicking breakables to open vertical route upward. Starting step: move left to column 2 for better angles.
